controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the rbi [conduct of government business by agency banks (abs) - payment of agency commission and oversight of abs] directions, 2026
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the RBI [Conduct of Government Business by
Agency Banks (ABs) - Payment of Agency Commission and Oversight of ABs]
Directions, 2026.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the rbi [conduct of government business by agency banks (abs) - payment of agency commission and oversight of abs] directions, 2026

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect immediately upon its issuance
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into effect immediately upon its issuance, unless
indicated otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect immediately upon its issuance

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to abs
controls.control_description: These Directions shall be applicable to ABs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to abs

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them as below:
controls.control_description:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall bear
the meanings assigned to them as below:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them as below:

controls.control_objective: To ensure all public sector banks (psbs), scheduled private sector banks (pvbs), scheduled payments banks (pbs), and scheduled small finance banks (sfbs) appoin
controls.control_description:
(a) 'ABs' means all Public Sector Banks (PSBs), scheduled Private Sector Banks
(PVBs), scheduled Payments Banks (PBs), and scheduled Small Finance Banks
(SFBs) appointed by RBI under Section 45 of the RBI, Act, 1934, by mutual
agreement, to carry out Government Banking business of Central Government
(CG) / State Governments (SGs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to all public sector banks (psbs), scheduled private sector banks (pvbs), scheduled payments banks (pbs), and scheduled small finance banks (sfbs) appoin

controls.control_objective: To ensure the remuneration paid by the rbi to an ab in consideration of it acting as an agent of the rbi in conduct of general banking business of the cg and th
controls.control_description:
(b) 'Agency Commission' means the remuneration paid by the RBI to an AB in
consideration of it acting as an agent of the RBI in conduct of general banking
business of the CG and the SGs at the places and in the manner specified in
the agreement entered between RBI and the bank, with the exception of the
functions relating to the management of the public debt.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to the remuneration paid by the rbi to an ab in consideration of it acting as an agent of the rbi in conduct of general banking business of the cg and th

controls.control_objective: To ensure an arrangement where funds are paid in advance by government to the ab to cover future liability, obligation or settlement
controls.control_description:
(c) 'Prefunded scheme' means an arrangement where funds are paid in advance
by Government to the AB to cover future liability, obligation or settlement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to an arrangement where funds are paid in advance by government to the ab to cover future liability, obligation or settlement

controls.control_objective: To ensure 'payment scroll' or 'receipt scroll': (da) 'payment scroll' means a physical or electronic statement submitted by an ab that lists the payments made a
controls.control_description:
(d) 'Scrolls' means 'payment scroll' or 'receipt scroll':
(da) 'Payment scroll' means a physical or electronic statement submitted by an AB
that lists the payments made and claimed from the Government account at the
RBI for a Ministry or Department on a given date, used for accounting and
reconciliation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 'payment scroll' or 'receipt scroll': (da) 'payment scroll' means a physical or electronic statement submitted by an ab that lists the payments made a

controls.control_objective: To ensure a physical or electronic statement submitted by an ab that lists the receipts collected and remitted to the government account at the rbi for a minist
controls.control_description:
(db) 'Receipt scroll' means a physical or electronic statement submitted by an AB
that lists the receipts collected and remitted to the Government account at the
RBI for a Ministry or Department on a given date, used for accounting and
reconciliation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a physical or electronic statement submitted by an ab that lists the receipts collected and remitted to the government account at the rbi for a minist

controls.control_objective: To ensure an electronic form of file in 'extensible markup language (xml)' format reported by banks to rbi containing details of the transactions
controls.control_description:
(e) 'Luggage file' means an electronic form of file in 'eXtensible Markup Language
(XML)' format reported by banks to RBI containing details of the transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to an electronic form of file in 'extensible markup language (xml)' format reported by banks to rbi containing details of the transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the applicable acts, rules/ regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re
controls.control_description:
All other expressions, unless defined herein, shall have the same meaning as have
been assigned to them under the applicable Acts, Rules/ Regulations made thereunder,
or any Statutory modification or re-enactment thereto, or Glossary of terms published by
RBI as used in common or commercial parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the applicable acts, rules/ regulations made thereunder, or any statutory modification or re

controls.control_objective: To ensure engage any bank for implementation of any of the prefunded schemes without reference to rbi
controls.control_description:
A CG Ministry/ Department (in consultation with CGA) and a SG Department [in
consultation with the respective Accountant General's (AG) Office], respectively, may
engage any bank for implementation of any of the prefunded schemes without reference
to RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to engage any bank for implementation of any of the prefunded schemes without reference to rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure scrupulously comply with the instructions issued by government (central as well as states), without waiting for any further instructions from rbi
controls.control_description:
All ABs shall scrupulously comply with the instructions issued by Government
(Central as well as States), without waiting for any further instructions from RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to scrupulously comply with the instructions issued by government (central as well as states), without waiting for any further instructions from rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure take up directly with the respective government
controls.control_description:
For
queries related to such instructions, ABs shall take up directly with the respective
Government.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take up directly with the respective government

controls.control_objective: To ensure take up with dgba/ central accounts section (cas), nagpur, rbi
controls.control_description:
Similarly, for queries related to reporting to RBI, ABs shall take up with
DGBA/ Central Accounts Section (CAS), Nagpur, RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take up with dgba/ central accounts section (cas), nagpur, rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate the same separately in the scrolls ii
controls.control_description:
ABs paying their own tax liabilities through their own branches or through
authorised branches of any other AB, including State Bank of India (SBI) or
offices of RBI, wherever they do not have their own authorised direct tax
collection branch, should indicate the same separately in the scrolls
ii.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate the same separately in the scrolls ii

controls.control_objective: To ensure be implemented by a cg ministry/ department (in consultation with cga) or a sg department vi
controls.control_description:
Prefunded schemes, which may be implemented by a CG Ministry/ Department
(in consultation with CGA) or a SG department
vi.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be implemented by a cg ministry/ department (in consultation with cga) or a sg department vi

controls.control_objective: To ensure meticulously follow the instructions issued by rbi from time-to-time regarding transactions which are not eligible for agency commission
controls.control_description:
ABs shall meticulously follow the instructions issued by RBI from time-to-time
regarding transactions which are not eligible for agency commission.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to meticulously follow the instructions issued by rbi from time-to-time regarding transactions which are not eligible for agency commission

controls.control_objective: To ensure be directly reported to the cas on a daily basis similar to the transactions of public provident fund (ppf) scheme, in order to maintain uniformity in
controls.control_description:
All the transactions, i.e., receipt, payment, penalty,
interest, etc., shall be directly reported to the CAS on a daily basis similar to the
transactions of Public Provident Fund (PPF) Scheme, in order to maintain uniformity in
reporting, reconciliation and accounting.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be directly reported to the cas on a daily basis similar to the transactions of public provident fund (ppf) scheme, in order to maintain uniformity in

controls.control_objective: To ensure observe the rules and regulations of the respective schemes
controls.control_description:
The ABs shall observe the rules and regulations of the
respective schemes.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to observe the rules and regulations of the respective schemes

controls.control_objective: To ensure be borne entirely by the ab
controls.control_description:
Pecuniary liabilities, if any, arising from such non-observance shall be borne entirely by
the AB.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be borne entirely by the ab

controls.control_objective: To ensure upload their luggage files in rbi's quantum payments exchange (qpx)/ e-kuber on all days except the global holidays
controls.control_description:
After the operationalisation of NEFT 24x7 and RTGS 24x7, ABs authorised to collect
Goods and Services Tax (GST), Customs and Central Excise Duties through Indian
Customs Electronic Data Interchange (EDI) Gateway (ICEGATE), Direct Taxes under
Tax Information Network (TIN) 2.0 channel, shall upload their luggage files in RBI's
Quantum Payments Exchange (QPX)/ e-Kuber on all days except the Global Holidays.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to upload their luggage files in rbi's quantum payments exchange (qpx)/ e-kuber on all days except the global holidays

controls.control_objective: To ensure be uploaded in rbi's qpx/ e-kuber at or before 1800 hours prescribed by the office of principal chief controller of accounts (pr
controls.control_description:
These luggage files shall be uploaded in RBI's QPX/ e-Kuber at or before 1800 hours
prescribed by the Office of Principal Chief Controller of Accounts (Pr.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be uploaded in rbi's qpx/ e-kuber at or before 1800 hours prescribed by the office of principal chief controller of accounts (pr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported for accounting to rbi through a separate statement after confirmation by the competent authorities of the sg
controls.control_description:
The SG transactions (electronic as well as physical mode) of previous month
reported after fourth of the succeeding month and those pertaining to earlier months
should be reported for accounting to RBI through a separate statement after
confirmation by the competent authorities of the SG.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported for accounting to rbi through a separate statement after confirmation by the competent authorities of the sg

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain prior approval from the respective ministry/department and submit the same to rbi separately at the time of reporting such transactions for set
controls.control_description:
For CG transactions (electronic as well as physical mode), or any adjustments
thereof, if reported after a gap of 90 days from the date of transaction, ABs must obtain
prior approval from the respective Ministry/Department and submit the same to RBI
separately at the time of reporting such transactions for settlement.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to obtain prior approval from the respective ministry/department and submit the same to rbi separately at the time of reporting such transactions for set

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the gms transactions, i
controls.control_description:
In order to maintain uniformity in reporting, reconciliation, and accounting, ABs shall
report the GMS transactions, i.e., receipt, payment, penalty, interest, commission for
mobilisation, handling charges, etc., directly through the Government account
maintained for the purpose at CAS, on a daily basis as in the case of the transactions
of Public Provident Fund (PPF) Scheme, 2019.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the gms transactions, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure make payment of interest to the depositors on the respective due dates and thereafter raise claim to government through cas
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, banks shall make payment of interest to
the depositors on the respective due dates and thereafter raise claim to Government
through CAS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make payment of interest to the depositors on the respective due dates and thereafter raise claim to government through cas

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as transaction under physical mode
controls.control_description:
For
example, challan generated electronically and submitted to AB, along with cash/
instrument, should be treated as transaction under physical mode.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as transaction under physical mode

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a single transaction, even if multiple major head/ sub-major head/ minor head of accounts are credited
controls.control_description:
A Challan Identification Number (CIN), generated after successful processing of a
single Common Portal Identification Number (CPIN), under GST payment process,
should be treated as a single transaction, even if multiple major head/ sub-major head/
minor head of accounts are credited.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a single transaction, even if multiple major head/ sub-major head/ minor head of accounts are credited

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a single transaction for the purpose of claiming agency commission (effective july 01, 2017)
controls.control_description:
All such records
clubbed under a single challan, i.e., CPIN, must be treated as a single transaction for
the purpose of claiming agency commission (effective July 01, 2017).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a single transaction for the purpose of claiming agency commission (effective july 01, 2017)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as single transaction only and not as multiple transactions, even if the challan contains multiple major head/ sub-major head/ minor head o
controls.control_description:
Similarly, in case of transactions not covered under GST, a single challan (electronic
or physical) should be treated as single transaction only and not as multiple transactions,
even if the challan contains multiple major head/ sub-major head/ minor head of
accounts that will get credited.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as single transaction only and not as multiple transactions, even if the challan contains multiple major head/ sub-major head/ minor head o

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a single transaction for the purpose of claiming agency commission
controls.control_description:
Therefore, records clubbed under a single challan
processed successfully must be treated as a single transaction for the purpose of
claiming agency commission.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a single transaction for the purpose of claiming agency commission

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit their claims for agency commission in the prescribed format (with gst details) to cas in respect of cg transactions, and to the respective ro o
controls.control_description:
ABs shall submit their claims for agency commission in the prescribed format (with
GST details) to CAS in respect of CG transactions, and to the respective RO of RBI for
SG transactions, respectively.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit their claims for agency commission in the prescribed format (with gst details) to cas in respect of cg transactions, and to the respective ro o

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit their agency commission claims pertaining to these receipt transactions to mumbai ro
controls.control_description:
Accordingly, all
authorized ABs shall submit their agency commission claims pertaining to these receipt
transactions to Mumbai RO.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit their agency commission claims pertaining to these receipt transactions to mumbai ro

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish their claims for agency commission to rbi within 60 calendar days, from the end of the quarter in which the transactions were conducted
controls.control_description:
ABs shall furnish their claims for agency commission to RBI within 60 calendar days,
from the end of the quarter in which the transactions were conducted.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish their claims for agency commission to rbi within 60 calendar days, from the end of the quarter in which the transactions were conducted

controls.control_objective: To ensure be accompanied by a formal explanation, detailing the reasons for the delay
controls.control_description:
If banks fail to
furnish claims within the stipulated period, any subsequent submissions to the RBI must
be accompanied by a formal explanation, detailing the reasons for the delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be accompanied by a formal explanation, detailing the reasons for the delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit agency commission claims related to special deposit scheme (sds) transactions to cas on a quarterly basis
controls.control_description:
All ABs shall submit agency commission claims related to Special Deposit Scheme
(SDS) transactions to CAS on a quarterly basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit agency commission claims related to special deposit scheme (sds) transactions to cas on a quarterly basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to claim reimbursement of both the interest paid and the withdrawals from the respective ros of rbi in which the mirror accounts are maintain
controls.control_description:
However, ABs shall continue to claim reimbursement of both the interest paid and the
withdrawals from the respective ROs of RBI in which the mirror accounts are maintained.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to claim reimbursement of both the interest paid and the withdrawals from the respective ros of rbi in which the mirror accounts are maintain

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that agency commission claims are submitted in prescribed format and are accurate
controls.control_description:
ABs shall ensure that agency commission claims are submitted in prescribed format
and are accurate.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that agency commission claims are submitted in prescribed format and are accurate

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that their internal inspectors/ auditors, during the course of their inspection/ audit, verify the agency commission claims submitted by their
controls.control_description:
In addition to this, ABs shall ensure that their internal inspectors/
auditors, during the course of their inspection/ audit, verify the agency commission
claims submitted by their branches and confirm their accuracy.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that their internal inspectors/ auditors, during the course of their inspection/ audit, verify the agency commission claims submitted by their

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit the agency commission claims, including applicable gst amount, as per prescribed agency commission rates, to respective ros/ cas as per extant
controls.control_description:
ABs shall submit the agency commission claims, including applicable GST amount,
as per prescribed agency commission rates, to respective ROs/ CAS as per extant
instructions of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit the agency commission claims, including applicable gst amount, as per prescribed agency commission rates, to respective ros/ cas as per extant

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deducted as applicable by rbi at the time of paying agency commission in accordance with the government instructions
controls.control_description:
TDS on GST shall be deducted as applicable by RBI at the time of
paying agency commission in accordance with the Government instructions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deducted as applicable by rbi at the time of paying agency commission in accordance with the government instructions

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 14 per pensioner per financial year
controls.control_description:
The number of transactions eligible for agency commission should not exceed 14
per pensioner per Financial Year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 14 per pensioner per financial year

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as a single credit transaction and not as separate monthly credits
controls.control_description:
In other words, any payment of arrears on account of late start/ restart of
pension should be treated as a single credit transaction and not as separate monthly
credits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as a single credit transaction and not as separate monthly credits

controls.control_objective: To ensure to account for the transaction by passing on the scrolls and documents to the local/ nearest branch of rbi or to any ab conducting government business
controls.control_description:
(b) At 75% of the applicable rate, where the dealing branch is required to account for
the transaction by passing on the scrolls and documents to the local/ nearest
branch of RBI or to any AB conducting Government business
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to to account for the transaction by passing on the scrolls and documents to the local/ nearest branch of rbi or to any ab conducting government business

controls.control_objective: To ensure settle their agency transactions for both funds and agency commission directly with the respective ro of rbi instead of routing them through any other
controls.control_description:
All ABs should settle their agency transactions for both funds and agency
commission directly with the respective RO of RBI instead of routing them through any
other AB that acts as an aggregator in certain cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to settle their agency transactions for both funds and agency commission directly with the respective ro of rbi instead of routing them through any other

controls.control_objective: To ensure be directly settled with the respective ro of rbi
controls.control_description:
Similarly, payments made by ABs,
on behalf of SGs should be directly settled with the respective RO of RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be directly settled with the respective ro of rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded directly by individual ab to the respective sg/ treasury
controls.control_description:
Agency
transaction details/ scrolls shall be forwarded directly by individual AB to the respective
SG/ Treasury.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded directly by individual ab to the respective sg/ treasury

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as 'receipts-e- mode'
controls.control_description:
As stated above, transactions which
do not involve physical receipt of cash/ instruments should be treated as 'Receipts-e-
mode'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as 'receipts-e- mode'

controls.control_objective: To ensure claim commission for such transactions, as applicable for physical receipts, on the basis that mandate to transfer the amount to government was submit
controls.control_description:
ABs should not claim commission for such transactions, as applicable for
physical receipts, on the basis that mandate to transfer the amount to Government was
submitted physically.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to claim commission for such transactions, as applicable for physical receipts, on the basis that mandate to transfer the amount to government was submit

controls.control_objective: To ensure attract imposition of penalty
controls.control_description:
As per the agreement between the AB and the RBI, violation or non-compliance of
instructions issued by Government and/or RBI shall attract imposition of penalty.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to attract imposition of penalty

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted to the ros of rbi, under which the branch/ office falls, within 30 days from the date of communication of the action points
controls.control_description:
(b) Comments in respect of action points marked as 'Major' should be submitted to
the ROs of RBI, under which the branch/ office falls, within 30 days from the date
of communication of the action points
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted to the ros of rbi, under which the branch/ office falls, within 30 days from the date of communication of the action points

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured by the bank itself
controls.control_description:
(c) For 'Other' action points, necessary rectification should be ensured by the bank
itself.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured by the bank itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be examined and commented upon by internal audit
controls.control_description:
The quality and sustenance of compliance to such 'other' action points
should also be examined and commented upon by internal audit
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be examined and commented upon by internal audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure report details of their government business as per the formats enclosed in annex 3 and annex
controls.control_description:
(d) As a part of offsite monitoring of Government business, ABs should report details
of their Government business as per the formats enclosed in Annex 3 and Annex
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report details of their government business as per the formats enclosed in annex 3 and annex

controls.control_objective: To ensure be e-mailed to dgbaomc@rbi
controls.control_description:
The completed statements should be e-mailed to dgbaomc@rbi.org.in, with a
copy to the RO of RBI under whose jurisdiction the bank falls.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be e-mailed to dgbaomc@rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that internal/ concurrent audit at bank branches verifies whether government business is being conducted as per rules and regulations prescribe
controls.control_description:
Systems and controls for conduct of Government Banking: In addition to the
existing instructions, ABs shall ensure that internal/ concurrent audit at bank branches
verifies whether Government business is being conducted as per rules and regulations
prescribed by Government/ RBI, including examination of, among other things, agency
commission claims, pension payments, etc.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that internal/ concurrent audit at bank branches verifies whether government business is being conducted as per rules and regulations prescribe

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided to the inspecting officers/auditors, which shall, at a minimum, include the illustrative items given at annex 6
controls.control_description:
A checklist shall be provided to the
inspecting officers/auditors, which shall, at a minimum, include the illustrative items
given at Annex 6.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided to the inspecting officers/auditors, which shall, at a minimum, include the illustrative items given at annex 6

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The instructions and guidelines
already repealed shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under these
repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal of these
Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelin
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced
and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those Directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture, or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelin

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or Directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to remove
any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these Directions, the
Reserve Bank̥ may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect of any
matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the
Reserve Bank shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding

controls.control_objective: To ensure indicate the same separately in the scroll and such transactions will not be eligible for payment of agency commission
controls.control_description:
Total (3 + 6 + 9) Beginning of
End of Quarter
Quarter
Number of pension accounts
**Agency Banks (ABs) paying their own tax liabilities through their own branches or through
authorised branches of any other AB (including SBI) wherever they do not have their own
authorised direct tax collection branches should indicate the same separately in the scroll and
such transactions will not be eligible for payment of agency commission.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to indicate the same separately in the scroll and such transactions will not be eligible for payment of agency commission

controls.control_objective: To ensure verify the agency commission claims submitted by branches and confirm their accuracy during the course of their inspection/audit
controls.control_description:
Annex 6
Checklist relating to Government Business for internal / concurrent audit
Part A: Agency commission claims
Internal inspectors/auditors shall verify the agency commission claims
submitted by branches and confirm their accuracy during the course of their
inspection/audit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to verify the agency commission claims submitted by branches and confirm their accuracy during the course of their inspection/audit

controls.control_objective: To ensure be specifically examined during the course of internal/concurrent audit at agency bank (ab) branches:
controls.control_description:
The following shall be specifically examined during the
course of internal/concurrent audit at Agency Bank (AB) branches:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be specifically examined during the course of internal/concurrent audit at agency bank (ab) branches:

controls.control_objective: To ensure assess branch performance in servicing pensioner customers
controls.control_description:
Whether the entries in the registers/printouts relating to agency
commission claims are properly authenticated
Part B: Pension / Government Business related issues
Internal inspections should assess branch performance in servicing
pensioner customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to assess branch performance in servicing pensioner customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured:
controls.control_description: In this regard, the following shall be ensured:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be devised for use during inspection of pension paying branches
controls.control_description:
A specific questionnaire covering all aspects of pension payment shall
be devised for use during inspection of pension paying branches
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be devised for use during inspection of pension paying branches

controls.control_objective: To ensure also, during inspections, call up pensioners at random and enquire about their satisfaction with pension-related services
controls.control_description:
Inspecting officers shall also, during inspections, call up pensioners at
random and enquire about their satisfaction with pension-related
services
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also, during inspections, call up pensioners at random and enquire about their satisfaction with pension-related services
